reviews.review_description:
Another day another vr game that does not support inputs for left handed players. Sadly there is no option to swap sticks to get movement on the right stick and turning on the left stick + action buttons swapped accordingly if needed.

Game seems interesting but the lack of controller input options makes it unpleasant to play for left handed players.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback. I’m actually left handed, but actually just always liked playing ”like I would be right handed”. We’ll make sure to address it in future updates however.

reviews.review_description: I can't wait till this drop and more content is added, this demo is nice, this is something different that's coming to the quest!

developer_response.body: Thanks! We are hard at work on the next Early Access drop. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description:
All the devs can help you in the discord server
And the game physics is amazing, it feels nice in slow motion, the story really shows what your playing for and what your goal is, theres an active community, and the devs work hard on the game 24/7 10/10 Great game!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much Kevin! We worked super hard on combat 360 engine, arcade & story for the Early Access 2.0 & Demo 2.0 release. Expect a 2.1 update soon. See you on the inside!

reviews.review_description: You should add a sandbox in the demo and the early access

developer_response.body: Thanks for your input, there is an Arcade Fight Mode in the Early Access version of the game (available on App Lab). Have you tried it?

reviews.review_description: Hear me out it’s not bad for a free demo

I'm a real lover of cyberpunk games and this one is really worth it trying!!! Feel like Neo in Matrix including shooting,  body combat, hacking... It has been improving a lot since it was created and now and early access version is available.  Check it out!! 😉

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! Your continuous support means a lot. As the Demo hasn't been updated in a year - definitely check out Early Access, which was just updated! 🥷🏻🌆Ps We have some truly crazy combat stuff coming in next update.

reviews.review_title: This game is ATROCIOUS. DO NOT BUY.
reviews.review_description: The game takes 5 minutes to beat and ends at the tutorial. You can't dodge or block enemies attacks, the graphics look disgustingly bad, the cutscenes are long and make up more than 90% of the game. The plot is a rip-off of the matrix, what little level design there is feels very poorly made, almost as if there was something good that used to be there. This game used to be good, functional and had lots of good stealth puzzles that made me excited for the full versions release, but they scrapped all of the good parts which also took out the padding; and replaced them with boring, cyclical cutscenes that don't even have substance to them. This game could have been great. Shame the devs had to ruin it.

developer_response.body: Thanks for feedback. Play the full early access to continue after the tutorial. You can block and dodge punches by using your body and and the stealth puzzles are in the full early access. All the best!

reviews.review_description: The demo gives one a short overview on what kind of a game this is. All in all the systems in place seem to be working alright and the bullet-time effect after punching enough faces is a neat hook that should probably be developed further. The overall feel reminds me of the newer Deus Ex games.

developer_response.body: Thanks!! Expect the overdrive slow mo knockouts to get even better in next summer update. Checkout full early access to try other systems for hacking, climbing and stealth to infiltrate into Cortex facilities, as well as final boss fight 💀

reviews.review_description: The combat feels nice I can feel the power when I punch someone and I think the hacking is pretty cool but a little annoying and I kinda wish we had weapons🔫

developer_response.body:
Thanks!! Stay tuned for even more improved combat variation in next summer update
🥷 Great feedback is appreciated. Feel free to join our Discord and to directly give specific feedback to affect the development of Deceptive Reality.

reviews.review_description: could you guys make the demo longer please and thank you

developer_response.body:
Thanks! The full game is regularly updated with new mechanics and is 10X longer. 

It was just updated with a new high rise action level, melee weapons etc. Next will be Fury Combat Grip. 

These will not be included in this demo, which was updated a year ago.

reviews.review_description: Haven’t problem with hand movement

developer_response.body: Thanks! Make sure to check out Early Access 1.0. Out now 🎄

reviews.review_description: Demo got me so psyched for this game I bought the early access straight after. There's fighting, exploring, and hacking in a beautiful dystopian environment. Definetly a showcase for the Quest's potential not just graphically (but definitely graphically) but also in terms of combining combat, puzzles, exploration and storytelling.  Can't wait to see what's in the early access and I'm confident the final release will be sicckk!

developer_response.body: Awesome that you liked the extra attention we put into the world building as well as the gameplay! Currently the early access, in addition to the alleyway, includes an Arcade Fight Mode. There will aslo be updates along the way until Early Access 1.0 and the final release of the game.

reviews.review_description: I love it good demo

developer_response.body: Thank you! Early Access is also available on App Lab now, if you are interested :)

reviews.review_description: The lighting was good so was the voice over but the hacking is god awful so if you see this please fix

developer_response.body: Thanks for feedback. Please join our Discord and describe what issues you encountered with the hacking, eg if you didn't know what to do. Early Access 1.0 will be released on the 15th of December, we polished the system and added some tips on the hacking.

reviews.review_description:
Found this game via TikTok.
I'm absolutely loving the game's visual style & combat, that’s what got me hooked in. Can't wait to experience the full game.

developer_response.body: Thank you! See you in Early Access, we just released 1 vs 20 fighting update - more stuff will be announced soon on our Discord.

reviews.review_title: The American Nightmare in Cyberpunk City
reviews.review_description:
This game has three things I love: Cyberpunk / technoir theme, a love story set during the fading American Dream and FIGHTING. Currently in this free demo 2.0 & paid early access 2.0, the game is already very impressive. I love that the combat uses automatic triggering of slow motion, which makes you feel like you have superhuman reflexes using the brain-chip installed in your head. Punching feels satisfying with impact and bodies flying in slowmotion, and look forward to improvements in next update (apparently knockouts will be improved). Using your body in real-life for dodging instead of a dodge button is a cool feature and things become really sweaty! 

I didn't get to try hacking, climbing and stealth that is apparent in the full early access.

The storytelling of the fading American Dream and a tech giant that only gives a brain-chip to the elite, creating further inequality between the rich and middle-class in this VR game is unique, presented in comic-style panels with real actors. Dialogues unfold interestingly during comics with some very interesting in-game "cutscenes" (NO SPOILERS HERE) which were quite a surprise. 

For a Quest game the environment looks amazing. For such a small team, this game shows a lot of passion. For a demo there are very little bugs, which probably will be polished out. To me the early access 2.0 is the next step and a must have. To me this looks like it can become a best-seller!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much Marko! Stay tuned for even more improved combat variation in next summer update 🥷 at the same time we have built more story on how Declan’s search for his love Aya that you’ll find out in the full early access. Enjoy. Make sure to join our Discord to be an active part in the development.

reviews.review_description: Best game

developer_response.body: Thank you! Stay tuned for next week’s 2.1 update.
